title: Replication Data for Prior Steps into Bibliometric Mapping
author: Santosa, Faizhal Arif
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The goal of this research is to use text mining to perform pre-processing to find the basic terms of the keywords that appear – to construct a controlled vocabulary for a bibliographic dataset essentially. The method used in this study is cleaning keywords with the stemming method using RapidMiner software. A web application is accessible at www.coconut-libtool.com
